title: Risk
description: A risk to delivery or operation, with impact, likelihood, derived exposure, and a mitigation. IDs follow the RISK- scheme.

impact.description: Severity of consequence if the risk materializes.

exposure.description: Derived overall exposure (impact x likelihood). Reproducible from impact and likelihood.

mitigation.description: Plan to reduce probability or impact.

contingency.description: Fallback if the risk materializes despite mitigation.

owner.description: Who owns managing this risk (role, stakeholder ID, or name).

scope.description: Whether the risk applies to the MVP or the full target.

trigger.description: Observable signal that the risk is materializing (when to activate contingency).

source.description: Provenance: input section (a known risk) or derived stage.

mitigated_by.description: Decisions or work items that mitigate this risk.
